mapper.select: SELECT ms.*, m.name AS material_name, m.code AS material_code, m.unit, m.alert_threshold, wl.code AS location_code, CASE WHEN ms.quantity <= m.alert_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS alert FROM material_stock ms JOIN material m ON ms.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN warehouse_location wl ON ms.location_id = wl.id ORDER BY ms.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_stock (material_id, location_id, quantity, last_inbound_time) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{locationId}, #{quantity}, #{lastInboundTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE material_stock SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE material_stock SET quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, last_inbound_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND location_id = #{locationId}
UPDATE material_stock SET quantity = quantity - #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND quantity >= #{quantity}
